title: Failure to register; penalties
doc_html:
§646.  Failure to register; penalties

A person who fails to register as required by this Chapter shall be fined not more than five hundred dollars, imprisoned for not less than thirty days nor more than ninety days, or both.

Acts 2005, No. 163, §1, eff. June 28, 2005.
